form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when he was slow out over 350m at Healesville. Prior to that won by 2 lengths at Healesville (17.03) beating One Knee Noni in a Grade 5 on March 6. Has ability and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and lost ground approaching home turn.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after her success on March 24 at Horsham over 410m. Last start was second over 400m in 23.07, behind Paw Ramello. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (22.45) over 390m at this track. Has a low draw. Must be included.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when sixth and beaten 4.5 lengths at Warragul. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Makes plenty of appeal on best and can easily atone here.

form.formComment: Could only manage seventh last time but had been in the money the two starts prior, most recently when a narrow second (22.38) over 390m at Ballarat. Boxed awkwardly and looks tested this line up.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 390m at Ballarat. Looks tested in this company.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording four placings in a row, before finishing seventh (22.74) at this track last start. Has to overcome a wide draw and will need to find best.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 14 over 410m at Horsham behind Is He Lucky beaten 5 lengths (23.66). Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (22.23) over 390m at this track. Ran the fastest time on the program in that last win. Follow up.
